task: place the gray bowl in the oven
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A gray bowl is on a wooden table. A blue oven with a door is on the right. The bowl is a rigid container with a rim; the oven door has a handle. STRATEGY - Reach the bowl, grasp its rim for stability, transport it to the oven, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the bowl or misaligning it with the oven opening. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bowl rim; Step 2 grasp rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport to oven; Step 4 insert into oven opening.

Goal: inside(gray_bowl, oven)
Scene: gray_bowl, oven, table
Step 1: reach(gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, gray_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, gray_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
  contact: holding(gray_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(gray_bowl)
Step 3: transport(gray_bowl -> oven)
  affordance_region: an empty area near the oven door handle
  spatial: above(gray_bowl, oven, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(gray_bowl)
  done_when: above(gray_bowl, oven, 0.05)
Step 4: insert(gray_bowl -> oven)
  affordance_region: the open interior of the oven
  contact: inside(gray_bowl, oven) [completion]
  pose: stable(gray_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: inside(gray_bowl, oven)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
the rim of the gray bowl
an empty area near the oven door handle
the open interior of the oven
